data.title: Lazarus Group’s 2024 pause was repositioning for $1.4B Bybit hack
data.description:
North Korea-affiliated hackers may have scaled back their operations in the second half of 2024 while preparing for what became the largest crypto hack in history. The crypto industry was rocked by the enormous hack on Feb. 21 when Bybit lost over $1. 4 billion to the infamous North Korean Lazarus Group, which seems to have prepared the attack months in advance
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/lazarus-group-2024-pause-repositioning-1-4-b-bybit-hack?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ubisoft Shares Jump as Tencent Invests $1.25B in New Subsidiary

data.title: Users who participated in the Binance Web3 wallet PARTI new launch have had tokens airdropped to their Binance accounts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Users who participated in the previous Binance Web3 wallet new project PARTI have now received 88 or 44 PARTI tokens in their exchange accounts. It is recommended that participating users go to their Binance accounts to check the airdrop status. No additional operations are required for this airdrop, and eligible users will directly receive token rewards.

data.title: EU Proposes Capital Rule Requiring Insurers to Fully Back Crypto Holdings
data.description:
The European Union’s insurance watchdog is proposing a stringent new rule that would require insurers to maintain capital reserves equal to the full value of their cryptocurrency holdings.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/eu-proposes-capital-rule-requiring-insurers-to-fully-back-crypto-holdings/

data.title: Darkweb Hackers Claim 100K+ Gemini, Binance User Records
data.description:
Binance denies that the data came from a breach of its systems. Instead, it blames malware on infected user devices. According to Dark Web Informer, a cyber news site covering underground activities, a hacker known as AKM69 is selling a database containing 100,000 records of Gemini users
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/darkweb-hackers-claim-100k-gemini-binance-user-records/

data.title: Panama: bill introduced to regulate cryptocurrency payments
data.description:
The bill establishes a regulatory framework for digital asset service providers, including custody platforms and exchanges.
source: https://atlas21.com/panama-bill-introduced-to-regulate-cryptocurrency-payments/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=panama-bill-introduced-to-regulate-cryptocurrency-payments
